---
title: "07_evaluate_compare"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and saved result tables
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)

dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

expr_model_summary <- read_csv(here("outputs", "tables", "expression_model_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
expr_auc_summary <- read_csv(here("outputs", "tables", "expression_auc_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

meth_model_summary <- read_csv(here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_model_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
meth_auc_summary <- read_csv(here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_auc_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

multi_model_summary <- read_csv(here("outputs", "tables", "multiomic_model_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
multi_auc_summary <- read_csv(here("outputs", "tables", "multiomic_auc_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Add data source labels
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_model_summary <- expr_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Expression")

meth_model_summary <- meth_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

multi_model_summary <- multi_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Multiomic")

expr_auc_summary <- expr_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Expression")

meth_auc_summary <- meth_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

multi_auc_summary <- multi_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Multiomic")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Combine model summaries
#--------------------------------------------------

all_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  expr_model_summary,
  meth_model_summary,
  multi_model_summary)

all_auc_summary <- bind_rows(
  expr_auc_summary,
  meth_auc_summary,
  multi_auc_summary)

all_model_summary <- all_model_summary %>%
  mutate(
    model = recode(
      model,
      "ElasticNet" = "Elastic Net",
      "RandomForest" = "Random Forest"))

all_auc_summary <- all_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(
    model = recode(
      model,
      "ElasticNet" = "Elastic Net",
      "RandomForest" = "Random Forest"))

print(all_model_summary)
print(all_auc_summary)

write_csv(
  all_model_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "all_model_summary.csv"))

write_csv(
  all_auc_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "all_auc_summary.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Create final comparison table
#--------------------------------------------------

final_comparison <- all_model_summary %>%
  select(data_source, model, ROC, Sens, Spec, ROCSD, SensSD, SpecSD) %>%
  left_join(
    all_auc_summary,
    by = c("data_source", "model")) %>%
  arrange(desc(ROC))

print(final_comparison)

write_csv(
  final_comparison,
  here("outputs", "tables", "final_model_comparison.csv"))
```

```{r}
report_table <- final_comparison %>%
  mutate(
    ROC = round(ROC, 3),
    Sens = round(Sens, 3),
    Spec = round(Spec, 3),
    auc = round(auc, 3)) %>%
  select(data_source, model, ROC, auc, Sens, Spec)

print(report_table)

write_csv(
  report_table,
  here("outputs", "tables", "report_model_table.csv"))
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Plot AUC comparison
#--------------------------------------------------

p_auc <- all_auc_summary %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = data_source, y = auc, fill = model)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "AUC comparison across data types and models",
    x = "Data source",
    y = "Cross-validated AUC")

print(p_auc)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "auc_comparison.png"),
  plot = p_auc,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
auc_plot_df <- report_table %>%
  mutate(
    label = paste(data_source, model),
    label = factor(label, levels = rev(label[order(ROC)])))

p_auc <- ggplot(auc_plot_df, aes(x = ROC, y = label, fill = data_source)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", ROC)),
    hjust = -0.15,
    colour = "white",
    size = 4.5,
    fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Expression" = "#19E0E6",
      "Methylation" = "#F59E0B",
      "Multiomic" = "#8B5CF6")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(auc_plot_df$ROC, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.12)) +
  labs(
    title = "Model comparison by cross-validated ROC",
    x = "Cross-validated ROC",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Data source") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "#22324D", linewidth = 0.4),
    axis.title.x = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "#D9E2F2"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold", size = 24),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.title = element_text(colour = "white", face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(colour = "#D9E2F2"))

p_auc

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "auc_comparison_presentation.png"),
  plot = p_auc,
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "transparent")
```


```{r}
best_by_source <- final_comparison %>%
  group_by(data_source) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = ROC, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

best_by_model <- final_comparison %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = ROC, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

best_single_omics <- final_comparison %>%
  filter(data_source %in% c("Expression", "Methylation")) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = ROC, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE)

write_csv(best_by_source, here("outputs", "tables", "best_by_data_source.csv"))
write_csv(best_by_model, here("outputs", "tables", "best_by_model_type.csv"))
write_csv(best_single_omics, here("outputs", "tables", "best_single_omics_model.csv"))
```
